message:
fix: guard DeploymentRiskScore isDemoData during loading, harden CORS in ACCM functions, extract skeleton constants (#9920)

- Add && !isLoading guard to DeploymentRiskScore isDemoData computation
  so demo badge does not flash during initial load
- Replace vulnerable regex-based CORS origin validation in
  analytics-accm.mts and acmm-scan.mts with URL-parsed hostname check
  matching the pattern established in PR #9882
- Extract hardcoded skeleton dimension literals in envoy_status and
  linkerd_status to named constants matching containerd_status pattern

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@ export function DeploymentRiskScore() {
 
   const isLoading = argo.isLoading || kyverno.isLoading || pods.isLoading
   const isRefreshing = !!argo.isRefreshing || !!kyverno.isRefreshing || !!pods.isRefreshing
-  const isDemoData = !!argo.isDemoData || !!kyverno.isDemoData || !!pods.isDemoFallback
+  const isDemoData = (!!argo.isDemoData || !!kyverno.isDemoData || !!pods.isDemoFallback) && !isLoading
   const consecutiveFailures = Math.max(
     argo.consecutiveFailures || 0,
     kyverno.consecutiveFailures || 0,

@@ -29,6 +29,12 @@ import type { EnvoyListener, EnvoyUpstreamCluster } from './demoData' // Named constants (no magic numbers) // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- +const SKELETON_TITLE_WIDTH = 140 +const SKELETON_TITLE_HEIGHT = 28 +const SKELETON_BADGE_WIDTH = 90 +const SKELETON_BADGE_HEIGHT = 20 +const SKELETON_LIST_ITEMS = 5 + const RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS = 60_000 const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24 @@ -133,11 +139,11 @@ export function EnvoyStatus() { return (
- - + +
- +
) }
